expectations.text: Provides a complete GitHub Actions YAML workflow file
expectations.evidence: Provides complete .github/workflows/ci.yml with all jobs, services, and steps

expectations.text: Includes a PostgreSQL service container for integration tests
expectations.evidence: services.postgres block with postgres:16 image, health checks (pg_isready), and port mapping

expectations.text: Covers both CI (on PR) and CD (on main merge) stages
expectations.evidence: Separate 'test' job (runs on PR) and 'deploy' job (if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') with needs: test

expectations.text: Explains how to handle secrets via GitHub Actions secrets
expectations.evidence: Step 5 explicitly covers Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions, with distinction between ephemeral CI creds vs. real secrets

expectations.text: Includes dependency caching to speed up runs
expectations.evidence: actions/cache@v4 caching ~/.cache/pip with key based on hashFiles('requirements.txt')

expectations.text: Mentions a deploy step for the CD stage
expectations.evidence: Step 6 provides complete deploy job using Railway CLI with RAILWAY_TOKEN secret and environment: production gate
